description: This image is a screenshot of a digital "Help" form, likely used for submitting support requests within the CLC+ Core system, as indicated by the surrounding context. The form is titled "Help" at the top and features several input fields: a text box for "Summary", a dropdown selector for "Priority" which defaults to "Medium", a larger text area for "What are the details of your request?", an "Attachment (optional)" section with a "Choose file" link, and a text box for "Your contact e-mail". At the bottom, a "Send" button is displayed. The footer of the form states "Powered by Jira Service Management". A vertical scrollbar is visible on the right side of the form, and an 'x' icon is in the top right corner for closing the form.
